    • 51 Core Initiations

      SUGGESTION:

      If you have not yet been in one of the initiations listed below, please contact your PLab Trainers at the http://www.possibilitymanagement.org website to find out when they will do a PLab that includes that initiation. During 42 years of research we have come to recognize that in order to get to the starting point, that is, in order for you to stabilize in the Adult Ego State where Possibility Management begins, it generally requires most of the listed initiations. In terms of time and energy this is the equivalent of a 4 year university education. If you commit to engaging authentic adulthood initiation work for yourself, then somewhere in the process you offload enough baggage and get connected to enough resources that survival ends and living begins. This is an utterly astonishing experience because it is not predicted by school, parents, or modern society, even if we are designed for it, even if it is our birthright as human beings to authentically grow up.

      It helps to remember that Possibility Management is not about feelings work or therapy. Possibility Management is the gameworld that automatically emerges in the process of upgrading your thoughtware to the context of radical responsibility. The gateway to making use of Possibility Management is the Adult Ego State, because if you are not basically stabilized in the Adult Ego State you remain hookable by circumstances.

      The feelings work that is included at the beginning of learning Possibility Management has a Phase One where you learn how to feel, and then a Phase Two where you can consciously apply the energy and information of your feelings in an amazingly empowered and clear life of communicating and relating. For example, Phase Two Feelings Work is the gateway to most of the core Possibility Management initiations. If you are still using the Old Thoughtmap of Feelings the initiations won't work for you. You will not be enough with yourself to allow the transformation to occur.

      In this same way, Possibility Management itself has a Phase One during which time you are upgrading your thoughtware and learning the new skills and tools of Possibility Management, and a Phase Two where you are using your Gremlin to catch your Gremlin, where the lizard brain can't suddenly take you over and wreak havoc because you are naturally holding multiple simultaneous spaces and won't get identified with the lizard brain perspective even if it floods you with strong emotions, where something completely different from this really is possible in each moment because you are there serving as a Possibilitator. The point to remember is that you just can't get to Phase Two except through accomplishing in reality (not just in your mind...) Phase One. No one can do this for you. No one can stop your from doing it.)

      (NOTE FOR TRAINERS: The Trainer Guild strongly suggests that before you deliver any initiation for others you participate in it at least twice yourself. During the second time in the initiation you get it what happened the first time.)

      51 CORE POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT ADULTHOOD INITIATIONS LISTED IN A PARAGRAPH:

      1. Radical Responsibility for being a Storymaker (this happens at Expand The Box training), radical responsibility for Declaring, 2. Attention and Centering (splitting attention, self-observation, and the waking state), 3. Navigating Space (radical responsibility for Asking, radical responsibility for Space), 4. Verbal Reality To Experiential Reality, 5. Opening Your Pearl, 6. Radical Responsibility For Emotions, 7. Stellating Anger, 8. Stellating Fear, 9. Stellating Sadness, 10. Stellating Joy, 11. Distilling Destiny (Bright Principles), 12. Gremlin Hunting (drawing and learning the name of your Gremlin), 13. Escaping Constructs, 14. Going Sane, 15. Low Drama Exit, 16. Radical Honesty, 17. 4 Brains (lizard brain practices), 18. Hidden Purpose (Shadow Principles), 19. The 9 Gaps, 20. Dying, 21. Mom & Dad, 22. Box Is Optional, 23. Box And Being, 24. Hidden Competing Commitments, 25. I Cannot Commit To You Because, 26. Confronting With Questions, 27. I Already Have Everything That I Need, 28. Being Unhookable, 29. Peeling Off The Patriarchy, 30. School Day Initiation, 31. Archetypal Man Woman, 32. Making Time / Going Faster Than The Speed Of Time (radical responsibility for Time), 33. Choose One (radical responsibility for Choosing), 34. Relationship Space Cleanout, 35. Entfaltungs Process, 36. Diaphragm Process, 37. E-Body Retrieval and Reintegration (in all 7 chakras), 38. Coolness Factor, 39. Core Resonance Field, 40. Calling The Being Through, 41. Dragon Speaking, 42. I Am Initiation, 43. Relational Sitting (countenance), 44. Journey Into The Earth, 45. The Wall, 46. Vampire Entities (becoming a Trigger Hunter), 47. Goddess Dance (both men and women), 48. Master And Slave, 49. Connecting To Your Archetypal Lineage, 50. The various Self-Surgeries (Rewiring Fear, Trust Replacement, Brain Splits, and Mind Machines), and, 51. Intentionally left open for the hundreds of additional authentic adulthood initiations that have been developed in Possibility Management and in other contexts.

      SLIGHTLY EXPANDED LIST OF POSSIBILITY MANAGEMENT ADULTHOOD INITIATORY PROCESSES:

      1. Radical Responsibility For Being A Storymaker (in ETB, radical responsibility for Declaring).
      2. Verbal Reality To Experiential Reality.
      3. Distilling Destiny Initiation (your Bright Principles).
      4. Gremlin Hunting (with drawing and his name).
      5. Escaping Constructs.
      6. Going Sane.
      7. Hidden Purpose Initiation (your Shadow Principles).
      8. The Wall Initiation (creating doorways through shifting yourself).
      9. The Gap Initiation.
      10. The Box Is Optional.
      11. Box And Being Distinction Initiation (minimum 5 times, inner circle facing outer circle).
      12. Ouroboros / Horse Shoe Feedback Initiation.
      13. Low Drama Exit Initiation.
      14. Conscious Will:
        1. Using the 3 Powers: Declaring, Choosing, and Asking.
        2. Using your will to put your attention on your energetic center.
        3. Using your will to move your energetic center to your physical center so you are centered.
        4. Using your will to not scratch an itch, forever.
        5. Using your will to not follow an urge, forever.
      15. Conscious Attention:
        1. Using your will to put your attention on your attention (so you can consciously choose where to flow your energy of presence).
        2. Becoming aware of what you are aware of right now.
        3. Seeing what you are seeing with.
        4. Entering the waking state.
        5. Staying in the waking state.
      16. Opening Your Pearl (at the center of your being) to receive your original self-given instructions for your life. Since you did not know what language would be needed the instructions are symbolic and graphic, not linguistic, and usually come in three layers requiring three openings.
      17. Making your own pen and ink to start healing your Technopenuriaphobia. Using it to write letters of apology and appreciation to your enemies.
      18. Sleeping overnight alone in the woods.
      19. Declaring and Destroying Energetic Spaces, Holding, Navigating, Shifting Spaces, Calling Bright Principles Into A Space, Holding Double Space (your private personal bubble of space and your public energetic work space), Landing Distinctions in a Space, Building The Context Of A Space, Paying Obeisance to the Presiding Diety of a Space, Inventing New Culture Space in the Ethnosphere.
      20. I Cannot Commit To You Because (a group process).
      21. Distinguishing your Gremlin, Learning Your Gremlin's Name, Consciously Feeding Your Gremlin The Foods That You Choose, Type 1 or Type 2 Gremlin, Gremlin Reconstruction, Giving Your Gremlin Interesting Nonlinear Jobs to Do (this reinvents your life outside of modern culture restrictions, concepts, and definitions so you can deliver your destiny and do what you came here to do)
      22. Archetypal Man / Woman Initiation.
      23. Stellating Anger 100% (Stellating the Warrioress or Warrior Archetype, the Doer Maker).
      24. Stellating Sadness 100% (Stellating the Lover Archetype, the Communicator Healer).
      25. Stellating Fear 100% (Stellating the Sorceress or Magician Archetype, the Creator Inventor Designer Researcher Explorer).
      26. Stellating Joy 100% (Stellating the Queen or King Archetype, the Possibility Manager Leader Spaceholder).
      27. Radical Responsibility for Emotions.
      28. Archiarchal Initiations (What is Archiarchy? How to create and live in an Archiarchal Context with neighbors who live in mainstream modern culture or some other culture? What is different about life in Archiarchy? What is the Evolution Of Relating in Archiarchy such as man, woman, children, family, community, village, global meshwork of Archiarchal Nanonations?)
      29. Build Your Own Country Gameworld (Three people entering an energetic configuration of commitment become a nanonation as a seed-crystal gameworld in the global ethnosphere. The concept that a country must be associated with a piece of land is merely a concept, easy to understand. Just because you can understand a concept does not mean that concept has any relationship to reality.)
      30. Cultural Relativity (Culture is story. Religion is story. Politics is story. Stories are lies fabricated out of Is-Glue for a conscious or unconscious purpose. Who decides which culture you live in?) (What about now?)
      31. Possibility Speaking: being the space through which the Bright Principle of Possibility can speak into the world.
      32. Dragon Speaking Initiation. Being the space through which your Archetypal Lineage can speak into the world, saying what needs to be said about what you take responsibility for.
      33. Hidden Competing Commitments Initiation.
      34. Creating Possibility (the standard "Possibility Chair Work"). Navigate to the liquid state, use the golden keys, go nonlinear.
      35. Growing Up Initiation (the Mom and Dad process).
      36. Peeling Off The Patriarchy Initiation.
      37. Relationship Space Cleanout (both receive this for yourself and navigate this for another).
      38. The Diaphragm Initiation (both receive this for yourself and navigate this for another).
      39. Entfaltungs Initiation (both receive this for yourself and navigate this for another).
      40. Journey Into The Earth (both receive this for yourself and navigate this for others).
      41. Weaving Critical Connections Between Communities of Practice to Strengthen the Field of Influence for the Emergence of Next Culture (Note: critical connections are the connections across which immediate value is exchanged, for example, the value of a new distinction which creates new clarity and new possibility.)
      42. Carving your own wooden spoon. Eating with only that for a week.
      43. Oracle Initiation. Becoming the Oracle.
      44. Energetic Body (ebody) Retrieval and Re-Integration Initiation (both receive this for yourself and navigate this for another)
      45. Master and Slave Initiation.
      46. Sleep (how to disconnect from your Bright Principles and your Archetypal Lineage so that you can fall asleep, entering sleep)
      47. Eye Exercises (relaxing your eyes).
      48. Taking Back Your Hands Initiation (to shape space).
      49. Relaxing your "I's".
      50. Minimizing Your Now Initiation.
      51. Making Time Initiation.
      52. Going Faster Than The Speed of Time Initiation.
      53. Radical Honesty Initiation.
      54. Completing Incomplete Emotions Initiation (both information and feelings).
      55. Choose One (both receive this for yourself and navigate this for another).
      56. Flying (living in the liquid-state spaces of free attention between solid states) (experiencing that human beings are designed to fly).
      57. I Already Have Everything That I Need Initiation.
      58. I Cannot Commit To You Because.
      59. Relational Sitting Initiation (Countenance).
      60. X and U Group Initiation, X and U Personal Initiation (per Amy and Arnold Mindel - World Work http://www.aamindell.net/).
      61. Vampire Entities Initiation (becoming a Trigger Hunter, both for yourself and to navigate this for others).
      62. Dying Initiation.
      63. Archetypal Lineage Initiation (What are you really?).
      64. Sing Until The Song Sings You Initiation.
      65. What Evil Initiation.
      66. 8 Prisons Initiations.
      67. "I Am" Initiation.
      68. Self Surgeries:
        1. Rewiring the Meaning of Fear.
        2. Sewing Up Brain Splits.
        3. Trust Replacement Surgery (reconnecting to imagination).
        4. Bypassing Mind Machines.
        5. 8 to 10 Old Decision / New Decision Replacements during deep Emotional Healing Processes (EHP).
      69. Torus Meeting Technologies, including:
        1. Phoenix Process.
        2. M.E.S.S. (Mayan Extraordinary Synergy System).
        3. Frying Pan.
        4. Open Space.
        5. POP (Place Of Possibility).
        6. The Problem Is The Solution, etc.

    • Initiation Experiments

      No one can experiment for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from experimenting.

      WATCH THIS 7 MINUTE VIDEO AND WRITE DOWN ANY OF THESE AUTHENTIC ADULTHOOD INITIATIONS YOU HAVE NOT YET DONE - THEN DO THEM

      Matrix Code INITIATI.01

      1. Meet with your Possibility Team. Get everybody ready with
        • Your Beep! Books
        • Somebody able to start and stop the video
        • Somebody reading the INITIATIONS out loud as they go by.
         
      2. Each person writes down each INITIATION that they have not done, even if they do not understand what it is. 
      3. After the 7 minute video, sit for 10 minutes in silence and look at your life. Look at what you have thought your life to be in terms of education. What INITIATIONS and what preparations have you had for your life? Look at what you are missing in Phase 1 of adulthood. Look at the reality of your life.
      4. Have somebody hold space for a 333 Rage process, a 333 Grief process and a 333 Fear process.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.01 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      MAKE A PIRATE AGREEMENT FOR YOUR NEXT INITIATION

      Matrix Code INITIATI.02

      Initiation cannot be done alone. To go through an INITIATION, you need a spaceholder who has gone through that INITIATION to hold space for you. Having a team that walks with you on this path is a necessary element to successful INITIATION.

       

      Therefore, this Experiment happens in a Team: your Possibility Team, your 3Cell or a Healing Circle.

      1. Complete the previous Experiment on this list.
      2. With feedback and coaching from the Team, each person chooses their next INITIATION.
      3. Make a Pirate agreement about going through this INITIATION in the next month. This probably means going to a Possibility Lab or joining another INITIATION space, online or offline.

      Be the Team that will do anything for this to happen. Ask and be the support every Team Mate needs, in any way possible, for this next INITIATION to happen. Set a date for your coming together again and reporting on the agreements made.

      Keep in mind that the pirate agreement needs to have a painful consequence when it is not completed such as paying for the whole team's next INITIATION.

       

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.02 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      DISCOVER THAT MODERN CULTURE IS AN UNINITIATED CULTURE

      Matrix Code INITIATI.03

      Choose 5 people from a different range who are still in modern culture: your parents, a boss, a shop owner, and interview them about their state of INITIATION. With your Team, before interviewing them, come up with 10 different questions that would reveal the state of INITIATION.
      Such as:

      What are you?
      What was the last thing you took responsibility for?
      What is your service to your community?
      What is your relationship to your mother?
       

      It might become clear to you after all these interviews that who you are interacting with are actually not adults. That they are children in grownup bodies. Trying to interact with them as responsible clear, centered grounded bubbled adults you have been fooling yourself and lying to your self. You might even discover that even if you are older than 18 years old, when people interact with you, you are also still behaving as an adolescent. Being hookable, not knowing what your quest is, not having access to inner and outer resources.

      Warning: this is not for beating yourself up. Not for making yourself wrong. And, this discovery might help you understand why the state of the world is in the state that it is, meaning the lack of INITIATION.

      While you are doing this experiment, those websites might support you: Psychopaths, Patriarchy and What Now?

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.03 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 6 Matrix Points.

      INITIATORY PROCESSES POSSIBILITY ACTING

      Matrix Code INITIATI.04

      Do this experiment with your Possibility Team.

      You have 6 people on stage, 3 are from an Indigenous tribe, and 3 are from Archiarchy. For 20 minutes, you are having a dharma combat on the differences between Indigenous adulthood INITIATIONS and the Archiarchy INITIATION processes.
      After the first round, you then switch roles, before you were trying to defend an Indigenous initiatory process and now you are defending Archiarchy initiatory processes.

      The reference material for indigenous initiatory processes is partly the two books written by Martin Prechtel: Secrets of the Talking Jaguar, Long Life Honey in the Heart, both of which are excellent books for a study group.

       

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.04 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 1 Matrix Point.

      FIND YOUR X ON THE MAP IN REGARDS TO ADULTHOOD

      Matrix Code INITIATI.05

      Bring this experiment into your Possibility Team meeting.
      Read out loud together the details of phase 1 and phase 2 Adulthood. Discuss what this means and have each person say where they are with regards to their phase 1 adulthood work.

      With some Sword out questions, Bullshit detectors so there is not so much self-deception and feedback and coaching from the team. Initiatory processes are involved in phase 1 adulthood. The point of this is to get each person an X on the map of where they are because it is so common, especially in spiritual New Age cliché archetype feel good wooshy gooshy pretend goddess groups and woke men's groups to put on the show that you are already capable of things you cannot even imagine you are doing. People think they are delivering their Nonmaterial Value to the village but they cannot even say what they want, they are totally Hookable, Reactive, contaminated with child and gremlin.

      The point of this investigation is to find out where you are really and to start over. The healing and transformation starts there.

       

      Watch this Possibilty Trainer video for a fabulous confrontation with a guy who recognised he has been fooling himself because he is not where he is, he is not in Integrity where he is.

       

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.05 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points if you actually start over from where you are.

      INTERVIEW 3 EVOLUTIONARY LEADERS ABOUT ADULTHOOD

      Matrix Code INITIATI.06

      First, read through the Adulthood website to get clear on the difference between Modern culture's and Archiarchy's view of Adulthood.

      In Modern culture, adulthood happens when you are 18 years old and you can drink, vote, smoke and drive. In Archiarchy, it begins as you start your initiatory Processes, and it never ends.

      It is a Path.

      Review the website and using that as a context connect with 3 people who are delivering workshops, seminars or trainings and ask if you can interview them about becoming an activated adult human being in the world. Make it a video interview like a zoom call. Make it last 30 to 45 minutes, or longer if it goes there. Be fierce in your questions. Mostly come out of distinguishing context. Understanding or basis of what Adulthood is. Not as an attack on the person but as a research journey. Demand radical honesty, radical Clarity, and an accurate assessment of current reality. Make this a Discovery journey together to deepen the Context and amplify the importance of realizing how the Potential for human Adulthood is so vast compared to what we are provided with through ordinary modern education.

       

      After completing this experiment and posting your interview online, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.06 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 6 Matrix Points.

      RELOCATE YOUR POINT OF ORIGIN OUT OF ADOLESCENCE AND INTO THE ADULTHOOD INITIATORY PATH

      Matrix Code INITIATI.07

      Childhood and Adolescence is the unititiated condition of the citizens of modern culture. There is another condition, which is the evolutionary path of adulthood. When you wake up each morning you are either consciously or unconsciously setting your foot into the context out of which you will live your day. The way you will solve problems, interact with people, create what happens in your day. Most people do this unconsciously. Therefore, their point of origin stays in the unitiated child and adolescent world. This experiment is to ask for an EHP - EHP dojo link - to prepare you to relocate your point of origin from the child/adolescent context to adulthood initiatory path context. After you have prepared yourself to the satisfaction of your PTeam and or your 3cell, then ask for the process of relocating your point of origin.

      Check yourself by noticing what happens each morning when you wake up. Who are you arguing with in your mind, what voices are in your head, are you counting your enemies, how much fear do you have about not having enough money to survive, angst of not living the life that you actually want, what low dramas and reactivity are going on? Notice that. Notice all these things. Use self observation to notice all these things.

      Notice that you have this choice of stepping out of that each morning in a context of what are my practices today? What is my next experiemnt? What is my next article? Which unconscious habits will I avoid by replacing them with new practices? What is my adulthood initiatory adventure of today?
      You have a choice between these two worlds. Once you have relocated your point of origin, your lifetime in the adolescent uninitiated state will be like a memory of a mediochre or bad dream. You will have it as a memory. And you have a whole new quest.

      Matrix Points: 3

      CONSCIOUSLY DECIDE WHICH CULTURE YOU WANT TO SUPPORT AND LIVE IN

      Matrix Code INITIATI.08

      Ask somebody to ask you the question: What are you. Repeatedly. Write down your answers. I am a woman, I am a secretary, I am a Uruguayan citizen, I am a plumber, I am a graduate, I am the mayor of the village.

      After you have this list, then find out how many of these answers are of modern culture and how many are from next culture. To what degree do you have integrity with yourself? How sloppy is your inner structure? LOGO: inner structure.

      Because we have so many parts, hidden competing commitments that can be completely contradictory to each other. Spend an entire day and notice how much of your time and energy is spent serving modern culture. Your working for your jon, mowing your loan, bringing your kids to school, fililing up tax, buying things to keep up with the neighbors, watching TV, following the news cycle. And how much time are you serving your own culture?

      Report to your PTeam and ask them for experiments about letting go of baggage that is keeping your inner structure weak and sloppy and confused. Do 3 experiments to let go of baggage, distinguish which culture you actually want to be in and which experiments can you do to let go of baggage that are leftovers, just remnants of habitual unconscious habits following the birthculture of your parents. When you have cleaned out three parts of your inner structure, three discrepancies or disconitnuities then register the Matrix Points.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.08 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF section please enter three words that correspond to each of the inner structures you cleaned out. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.
       

      LEARN 5 ADULTHOOD SKILLS

      Matrix Code INITIATI.09

      Get with your Possibility Team and make a list of 10 or 15 possible adulthood skills that you could learn. Chooose 5 of them you will learn. Adulthoos kills are things like saying what you want, making distinctions, hold space for an adulthood contexted meeting.

      In terms of technopenuraphobia learn skills that allow you to live on planet earth without modern technology. Including growing zuchini and storing vegetable seeds from year to year, learn to probably dry and store and keep from getting cross polinated, learn to dry food to preserve it using a solar food dryer, learn how to make sprouts, so you can change seeds into fresh vegetables for your salad. (Do not sprout red kidney beans). Create pieces of clothing for yourself: hats, shoes, shirts, learn to repair a toaster or house appliances rather than just throwing them away. Learn to build with wood, for example a bird house.

      Choose 5 of them, do all 5, post photographs.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.09 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF section please name the 5 Adult skills you learnt. This Experiment is worth 5 Matrix Points.

      NOTICE THE DIFFERENCE BETWEEN A PAIN AND YOUR STORY ABOUT THE PAIN

      Matrix Code INITIATI.10

      Wait until you have some sort of pain, above level 3. Level 10 is you are screaming and rolling on the floor and level 1 is you are happy as a clam or butterfly. And then, stop everything. Stop moving, stop, talking. Notice that there is a difference between actual, physical sensations of the pain and your story about what this pain means, where it comes from, how long it is going to possibly last, what it will cause in your world. The horribleness of the fact that you have this pain. Notice that these two experiences are occurring in two entirely different bodies. Your emotional/intellectual body comes up with stories and emotions. Your physical body is having pain.

      This experiment is to disconnect these two phenomena through seeing where they come from. Get your Beep! Book. Write down the purpose of your interpretations that you are writing on top of the pain. IT is a purpose because it is a good excuse to not work, to get pay from other people, to avoid responsibility. It is the only way you have found to do what you want. To be alone. Or to be with other people. To get attention or company from other people.

      Separately, after all that, write down the purpose of the physical pain. Physical pain is a message from your body that is trying to send the alarm that something is off balance. The invitation is to use the 3 phase healing procedure to understand that the out of balance state is part of a evolutionary breakdown, not having the purpose to return to the original state but being the pathway through which you arrive in a new state. Part of the experiment is to take your physical pain through the 3 phase healing website. This experiment is to separate your physical body from the rest of your body. Discover that you are not your body.

      After doing the notes and doing the 3 phase healing, share what you discover in your PTeam.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.10 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF section name one thing your pain was helping you avoid responsibilty for. This Experiment is worth 4 Matrix Points.

      Specify the 4 parts.

      Extra credit: write answers
      If I am not any of my bodies, what am I?
      LOGO: 5 Bodies.

      CREATE YOUR INITIATION CENTRED VILLAGE

      Matrix Code INITIATI.11

      Maybe last experiment on the list.

      Start an adulthood initiation centered Bridge-House, decide that instead of going to university for a master's degree, get yourself Healed from School and shifted and escaped from the 8 Prisons and your relationship is
      the evolution of relating. That's what you do in the framework of your initiation centered Bridge-House. Send us the URL of your Bridge-House website. Put that in the proof so we can list you in the Bridge-House catalog website.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.11 in your free account at StartOver.xyz. In the PROOF section write the name of your Bridge-House. This Experiment is worth 100 Matrix Points. 

      MEET THE PART OF YOU THAT IS ACHING FOR INITIATION

      Matrix Code INITIATI.12

      Just like a caterpillar has the blueprint of going into a chrysalis then out into a butterfly. You too have, within you the blueprint for your own unfolding. There is an ache in you somewhere that is ready and thirsty for Initiation. This experiment is to get to know that part of you, in a Non-linear way. It is important to remember that your mind does not already know how your Initiation into Authentic Adulthood goes, no one else knows how yours will go either.

      1. Start a page in your BeepBook titled: My Ache for Initiation

      2. Choose one of your favourite films to watch or one from the Possibility Films list.

      3. Set a timer to go off every 5mins.

      4. Pause the film and ask yourself questions: "What brings me to life in this scene? What am I feeling? What has my Attention? What am I hungry for as I watch this? What do I really love about this?" You can choose specific things like shades of light, objects, the way someone holds themself, the music, or a sentence. Also ask yourself, "What is my fear telling me to Notice or not notice right now?".

      5. You can do this for as many films as you like and you can keep noticing things and adding them to the list as you go about your day.

      As you continue to make notes of what your Ache for Initiation is, you will be starting to get to know the part of you that holds the keys to your next step.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.12 with one or two words you discovered about the part of you that is aching for Initiation in the PROOF section in your free account at StartOver.xyz. This Experiment is worth 2 Matrix Points.

      CHOOSE A GUIDE FOR YOUR INITIATION INTO AUTHENTIC ADULTHOOD

      Matrix Code INITIATI.13

      When you are ready (which you were at about age 15 years), a guide on your path of Initiation gives you invaluable nudges, hints, and feedback. This experiment is to scan for and choose a guide. You would have learnt to give your Centre to someone who knows more than you, such as an outside authority figure. This is what the modern culture school system trains you to do. Scanning for a guide is not about that. A guide will stand by you and show you Doorways at just the right time. It is not a guide's job to make you feel comfortable or give you answers, their job is to guide you on your Path. Your guide is someone slightly further along their path of initiation into authentic Adulthood.

      1. Declare that you are now officially scanning for a Guide on your path of Initiation. Wherever you are stand up and say out loud, "I am now Scanning for my Guide for my Initiation into Adulthood".

      2. Take out your Beep! Book and a pen. Start a fresh page where you will list by name every person that something deeper in you has been moved by. There is a part of you that notices more than the surface level appearance of people. This part of you holds the blueprint for you Initiation. If you did the experiment above INITIATI.12 you would have a sense for this part of you, (if you have not done that experiment, go and do that first).

      3. You are scanning for authenticity, Integrity, grounded-ness, Presence and an abilitiy to clearly speak and listen to others. Beyond that, Choose to trust your scanning.

      4. Choose one of the names, you have written.

      5. Call that person up and have an authentic conversation with them where you reveal exactly where they are at.

      6. Start being in spaces that they offer and doing the practices, experiments they offer.

      7. Keep detailed notes in your Beep! Book on what is alive in you as you embark of this journey. You are Choosing how far to go with any of the experiments or practices offered.

      Check in with yourself as you go: Do you have more options? Are you more alive? Is the quality of your relating improving? Do you have greater Clarity? You can always change guides and have more than one at the same time. You can do this experiment as often as you like.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.13 in your free account at StartOver.xyz, in the PROOF section write the name of one of your guides. This Experiment is worth 4 Matrix Points.

      DESIGN AND GO ON YOUR OWN GAIA WALK

      Matrix Code INITIATI.14

      The purpose of this experiment is to meet the signature of an initiation path. You will need 2 hours, your Possibility Team and access to a natural place where you can freely roam.

      1. Tell your Possibility Team that you are going on a Gaia walk and at your next meeting ask if they will hold space for you to share what you discover.

      2. Go to the natural place (e.g. a park, a forest area, public reserve, or farm where you have permission to walk).

      3. Take of your shoes and sock.

      4. Find a item such as a stone or rock which will signify your thresh hold.

      5. Centre, Ground and Bubble yourself (if you do not already know how to do this, follow the links).

      6. Declare the next two hours to be dedicated to your quest of Initiation into Authentic Adulthood. Do this with the power of your Intention.

      7. Step over the thresh hold and start the 2-hour timer.

      8. Your task is to radically rely on your Intention to move you. This could come through your Feelings or Emotions. Or you may just experience sensations and urges. Do not force or push anything. Let yourself be carried over the land. Let your 5 bodies move you. If you notice you are trying to figure out how this goes, pause and centre yourself. You are getting to know the force of Gaia as it moves you.

      9. When the 2 hours are up, step back over your thresh hold and Declare your Gaia walk over.

      10. Make notes in your Beep! Book of anything that happened for example Emotions, visions, questions, significant urges or insights.

      11. At your next Possibility Team meeting ask for a Listening Space where you speak about your walk. Give details, share your gold and put your Attention on the heroine/hero journey elements to your walk.

      After completing this experiment, please register Matrix Code INITIATI.14 in your free account at StartOver.xyz, in the PROOF section write one thing you discovered about Gaia as a collaborator in your path of Initiation. This Experiment is worth 3 Matrix Points.

      DESIGN

      Matrix Code INITIATI.15

      DESIGN

      DESIGN

      Matrix Code INITIATI.17

      Matrix Code INITIATI.20

    • Personal Note About Jumping In...

      I hope you jump into the precious opportunities offered here.

       

      I know of no better people in the world than these I have listed as Initiators. These men and women are not just friends. They are skilled shift agents. They have paid full price. They have taken a stand in the world to bridge people through adulthood and archetypal initiatory processes into next culture, the culture of archetypally initiated women ecstatically collaborating with archetypally initiated men: Archiarchy.

       

      I encourage you to commit to your own unfolding. What you are truly capable of as an Free And Natural Adult human being is guaranteed to surprise you.

       

      No, the path of Adulthood is never completed. It has no end.

       

      Yes, once you proceed on the path the next step reveals itself. You do not have to know how it all goes before you start. Just start.

       

      It does not matter where you begin.

       

      What matters most is that you begin.

       

      Initiation is not isolated to your mind. It occurs in all 5 of your bodies simultaneously (physical, intellectual, emotional, energetic, and archetypal bodies).

       

      Yes, you will change. You will be growing up. Perhaps your parents never grew up. Perhaps your teachers never grew up. Then you have no role models for where you will be going. This is how it is right now. If you were surrounded by people who were ongoingly growing up and were providing you with authentic Adulthood initiations these notes would be unnecessary.

       

      Growing up is complex and difficult. It is not for children. Growing up activates so many dimensions of expansion it will blow your mind (thankfully).

       

      Yes, you will leave your childhood behind. It was important, and… it is not your future. Your future is unknown (thankfully).

       

      Either you are a victim of what you did not create and you live in the expectations that someone will rescue you… or you ongoingly create a new culture that thrives on evolution and the unexpected and you live in Possibility.

       

      Not everyone grows up at the same speed. The people around you now, your friends, may not understand your need to grow up. They may be afraid if you change because then it means they have the potential to change and this may frighten them. They may try to stop you. I still remember when I realized that I needed to go walk barefoot on fire. I told my wife and she said, "Don't do it." I told my best friend and work partner and he said, "Don't do it!" I did it anyway and it changed my life. It changed me. And within a couple of weeks the people close to me got adjusted to the new me.

       

      One suggestion is to find others you can currently relate to on the transformational pathway of growing up and work as a team to prototype something epic. Why not start living now in the culture you yourself long for?

       

      Each little team of adults-on-the-path is an alchemical crystal deposited here and there around the world.

       

      These teams are slowly coming into resonance to cause the big wave that shifts the status quo of the human race. It is already happening. You can help. How? By jumping into your next steps.

    • StartOver.xyz

      NOTE: This website is a Bubble in the Bubble Map of the free-to-play massively-multiplayer online-and-offline thoughtware-upgrade matrix-building personal-transformation real-life adventure-game called StartOver.xyz. It is a doorway to experiments that upgrade your thoughtware so you can relocate your point of origin and create more possibility. Your knowledge is what you think about. Your thoughtware is what you use to think with. When you change your thoughtware, you go through a liquid state as your mind reorganizes itself. Liquid states can bring up transformational feelings and emotions. By upgrading your thoughtware you build matrix to hold more consciousness and leave behind a low drama life of reactivity. No one can upgrade your thoughtware for you. More interestingly, no one can stop you from upgrading your thoughtware. Our theory is that when we collectively build 1,000,000 new Matrix Points we will change the morphogenetic field of the human race for the better. Please choose responsibly to read this website. Reading this whole website is worth 1 Matrix Point. Doing any of the experiments earns you additional Matrix Points. Please use Matrix Code INITIATI.00 to log your Matrix Point for reading this website on StartOver.xyz. Thank you for playing full out!

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By accepting, you agree the use of cookies. Learn More

      ×
      What Are Cookies?

      Cookies are bits of information (memory files) stored in your browser by sites you visit. As is common practice with almost all websites, this site uses cookie to improve your experience by remembering your preferences and enable other cookie-based features (e.g. analytics).

      Our Cookies

      When you submit data through a form such as those found on contact pages or comment forms, cookies may be set to remember your user details for future correspondence.

      In order to provide you with a better experience and remember your preferences, we need to set cookies so that this information can be called whenever you interact with a page.

      Third-Party cookies

      In special cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties like Google Analytics. Third party analytics are used to track and measure usage of this site so that we can continue to produce engaging content.

      How To Disable Cookies?

      Most browsers let you to refuse to accept cookies. See your browser Help or Tool for how to do this. Be aware that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of this and many other websites you visit. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.

      Cookie Use
      We use cookies to ensure a smooth browsing experience. By continuing we assume you accept the use of cookies.
